programme.title: Keith Stubbs
programme.desc: Keith Stubbs is a 'triple threat' in showbiz and entertainment. He's a hilarious stand-up comedian, talented actor, and award-winning radio personality.Keith was twice voted 'Best Comedian' by City Weekly, the Standard-Examiner named him 'Funniest Comic' and he was a semi-finalist in Comedy Central's Laugh Riots comedy competition. The Utah-based comic has made television appearances on A&E's An Evening at the Improv, nationally syndicated Comedy.TV, ABC's America's Funniest People and has established himself as a funny, improvisational comic, host, roastmaster and emcee.Keith tours nationally and has shared the stage with showbiz legends Joan Rivers, Jeff Foxworthy, Bill Cosby, Jim Gaffigan, Sinbad, Gladys Knight, and Frank Caliendo. Keith was one of five comedians who performed for the athletes in the Olympic Village at the 2002 Winter Games.Keith was named Best Actor by City Weekly for his show-stopping, comedic performance as 'Vinnie Black' in the stage production of Tony 'n Tina's Wedding. Stubbs currently plays Rob Schneider's accountant in the TV series "Real Rob" on Netflix.For eight consecutive years, Keith was awarded "Best Radio Personality" by the Utah Broadcasters' Association for his time spent as host of "The Stubbs Show" on 101.5 The Eagle. He also hosted KEITH STUBBS SPORTS on ESPN700 in Salt Lake City and appeared nationally on CMT radio and the Blue Collar Comedy channel on SiriusXM.Keith is often recognized for being a clean comedian, although his audiences span a broad spectrum. One review said, "Keith was funny, period! He was clean but we hardly noticed because his comedy and style are so unique and spot on."

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Proud smart aleck Robert G. Lee jokes about performing in a prison, Millennial baseball, and over-protective parents.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andrew's very personal and fun storytelling comedy, combined with his exemplary work ethic has earned him high praise from some of the best comedians in the business. Andrew is a featured writer, actor, and comedian on the TV show “UpLate NW.” Andrew has been featured on NBC, FOX, and the Bob & Tom Radio Show and is a regular opening act for Christopher Titus. Andrew was also featured on the popular Buzzfeed web series “Truth or Drink“, has performed in over 35 states and his new podcast called “Don't Quit Your Night Job” was featured in the Seattle Times.

programme.title: Lee Hardin
programme.desc: Lee Hardin is a comedian known for making bad decisions and his love for Taco Bell.

programme.title: Bengt Washburn
programme.desc: Bengt Washburn is an Aquarius with Hazel eyes who prefers boxer briefs, solid deodorants, and Crest toothpaste. He is 5'9? tall, weighs about 149 pounds and can bench 150 pounds three times without a spotter. He has a vertical leap of 16 inches. 8 years ago a lump appeared on his right thigh. It's not visible from the stage but according to some kids at the water park, it looks creepy. Many people say Bengt looks kind of like a monkey. Bengt Washburn was born in Salt Lake City, Utah but grew up in a large Utah town (1,200 people) as the fifth child in a small Mormon family (7 children). Bengt is married to an officer in the United States Airforce. They have lived in 6 different cities over the last eleven years. Most recently he moved to Springfield, Virginia (Washington D.C.) after living in Stuttgart, Germany for 3 years. Bengt is a former winner of the prestigious San Francisco International Comedy Competition. He has been seen on The Late Late Show with Craig Fergusen, Live at Gotham on Comedy Central and most recently Conan on TBS. He was invited to perform at the Vancouver International Comedy Festival, The Boston Comedy Festival, the Aspen Laff Festival and Gilda's Laugh Fest in Grand Rapids, Michigan. He's been heard on NPR, PRI and Bob and Tom. All three of his comedy Cd's can be heard playing on XM Sirius radio. Most people who know him would say Bengt is a logistically impaired ditz, but his comedy is described as intelligent, surprisingly universal considering the content matter and profoundly funny.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andrew Sleighter started in comedy looking for the perfect funny line to open a biography. Since then, Andrewís laid-back style and clever writing has won him appreciation from fans and respect from his peers. A regular at colleges and comedy clubs across the country, Andrewís also performed at some of the most prestigious comedy festivals in and out of the country including Bumbershoot, Bridgetown, The Cabo Comedy Festival, The Aspen Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull, and the Johnny Carson Great American Comedy Festival. Andrew wrote and blogged for the Sports Show with Norm Macdonald on Comedy Central and was a regular on the MTV prank show Money From Strangers. Heís performed on Nuvo TVís Stand Up & Deliver, Last Comic Standing, and made his late-night stand-up debut on Conan. Andrewís comedy has the ability to reach wide ranges of audiences and works in a diversity of rooms. Reliable and consistent, he rarely ends a show by lighting the stage on fire out of rage. Most importantly, heís constantly fascinated by and eager to keep learning about stand-up.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: LUCAS BOHN is energetic with an edge. The perfect blend of schoolboy charm and bad-boy charisma, his comedy is both smart and audacious. Known as the little guy who generates big laughs, Lucas has shared the stage with Dave Chappelle, Jimmy Fallon, and Kevin Hart. Lucas' high-energy shows and hilarious impersonations make him an instant hit with audiences of all ages. In 2013 Lucas was nominated "Comedian of the Year" by Campus Activities Magazine.

programme.title: Chris Porter Ugly and Angry
programme.desc: Last Coming Standing alum, Chris Porter, gives his look on drugs, growing old, womens fashion, and his love for Taco Bell.

programme.title: Chris Porter A Man From Kansas
programme.desc: Chris Porter discusses everything from hipsters ruining food, to being a man, to playing beer pong with celebrities, in his 3rd one hour special.

programme.title: Jimmy O. Yang: Good Deal
programme.desc: In his debut stand-up special Jimmy will tell you all about his take on Asian representation.

programme.title: D.L. Hughley Reset
programme.desc: A brand new comedy special, featuring the world-renowned D.L. Hughley, one of the most popular and highly recognized standup comedians.

programme.title: D.L. Hughley: Clear
programme.desc: Politically insightful legendary comedian, D.L. Hughley, takes the stage at the Regency Theatre in San Francisco.

programme.title: Steve Byrne Champion
programme.desc: Indomitable Steve Byrne brings the high-energy flair that earned him a nod as one of the best comics in the history of the Comedy Central Standup.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Merlin, the legendary wizard is stuck inside a terrible nether dimension. Meanwhile, the former stars of Wayne's World, Highlander, and The Young Ones are stuck in a terrible movie about Merlin, the legendary wizard. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to Phoebe! Join Bridget and Mary Jo as they lovingly guide you through all 28 minutes of this teen pregnancy hormone fueled event in Phoebe!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Pour a glass of scotch and join Bridget and Mary Jo as they riff this Sci Fi classic! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Bridget and Mary Jo from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K riff the classic Manos - the Hands of Fate! Run, don't stumble-walk-with-accursed-goat-legs to watch RiffTrax: Manos!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this driving scare film. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Borrowed Power!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 give their comedic riffing treatment to this classic 90's Vanilla Ice movie. Stop, collaborate and listen as Mike, Kevin and Bill team up to riff Cool As Ice.

programme.title: The Warrior's Way
programme.desc: Yang, the world's finest swordsman, packs it in and leaves Japan to find an old friend in the Wild West rather than kill the infant queen of a rival clan. He carries the baby to his friend's desolate, broken-down town the friend has died, so Yang reopens a laundry and settles down, hanging wet clothes, growing flowers, raising the infant, and finding himself attracted to Lynne, a red-haired woman with a tragic past. As long as Yang keeps his sword sheathed, his rivals won't find him, but a band of reprobate gunmen terrorize the town and threaten Lynne. Showdowns are inevitable, but once the sword is drawn, can Yang find rest, a home, and a family?

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The non-human machine ruling elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg assassin into the past to kill a young boy because he soon will be the resistance leader against the machines.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Robert De Niro and John Travolta star as two veterans hunting each other in this action thriller.

programme.title: Dark Tide (2011)
programme.desc: Kate (Halle Berry) accepts a lucrative opportunity to lead a thrill-seeking millionaire businessman on a shark dive in the most dangerous waters…outside the cage.

programme.title: The Homesman
programme.desc: Tommy Lee Jones stars in “the best western since UNFORGIVEN” (BBC). A low-life drifter helps a headstrong woman (Hilary Swank) cross the frontier after she rescues him from hanging.

programme.title: Last Shoot Out
programme.desc: Bruce Dern (The Hateful Eight) lights up this gritty, intense Western saga of love, betrayal, and revenge. After newlywed Jocelyn learns that her husband Jody (Michael Welch, Twilight) had her father shot down, she flees from the Callahan ranch in fear. She's rescued by gunman Billy Tyson, who safeguards her at a remote outpost as he staves off Jody's attempts to reclaim his bride. As the angry Callahans keep Billy, Jocelyn, and others captive at the outpost, an explosive showdown is inevitable.

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A hip Detroit detective (Eddie Murphy) drives out to Los Angeles and shows local police (Judge Reinhold, John Ashton) how to catch a killer.

programme.title: Alice Upside Down
programme.desc: Alice Upside Down is the story of an 11-year-old girl who has just moved to a suburb of Washington, D.C. with her father Ben and her 17-year-old brother Lester.

programme.title: Sweet Country
programme.desc: Australian western set on the Northern Territory frontier in the 1920s, where justice itself is put on trial when an aged Aboriginal farmhand shoots a white man in self defense and goes on the run as posse gathers to hunt him down. Festival favorite of Venice, Toronto, and Sundance.

programme.title: The Homesman
programme.desc: Tommy Lee Jones stars in “the best western since UNFORGIVEN” (BBC). A low-life drifter helps a headstrong woman (Hilary Swank) cross the frontier after she rescues him from hanging.

programme.title: Last Shoot Out
programme.desc: Bruce Dern (The Hateful Eight) lights up this gritty, intense Western saga of love, betrayal, and revenge. After newlywed Jocelyn learns that her husband Jody (Michael Welch, Twilight) had her father shot down, she flees from the Callahan ranch in fear. She's rescued by gunman Billy Tyson, who safeguards her at a remote outpost as he staves off Jody's attempts to reclaim his bride. As the angry Callahans keep Billy, Jocelyn, and others captive at the outpost, an explosive showdown is inevitable.

programme.title: Love, Game, Match
programme.desc: When the new economics teacher Liz team up with tennis coach Ted to organize the school carnival, sparks fly.

programme.title: A Harvest Homecoming
programme.desc: A teacher (Trevor Donovan) returns home to help at the family cider mill, where he meets the new marketing manager (Jessica Lowndes) and finds a new class of students to mentor.

programme.title: Swing Into Romance
programme.desc: A dancer (Danica McKellar) pairs with an unlikely partner (David Haydn-Jones), entering a contest to save her family's General Store.

programme.title: Girl's Best Friend
programme.desc: Cynical music critic Mary, who has never gotten over her failed marriage, refuses to open her heart again. But when she gets stuck on a cross-country road trip, her heart begins to soften.

programme.title: The Wedding March
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. College sweethearts Olivia and Mick are reunited.

programme.title: Lead with Your Heart
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Two teens hatch a plot to make their parents realize they still love each other.

programme.title: A Gift of Miracles
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Darcy finds a list of belongings her estranged mother intended to give to away.

programme.title: My Gal Sunday
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A newlywed couple must prove their crime-solving prowess.

programme.title: Color My World with Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Emma's daughter, who has Down Syndrome, is in a new romance Emma must navigate.

programme.title: Murder on Maple Drive
programme.desc: A couple purchases a home, and after they move in, strange things begin to happen.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: True stories of women in peril as told by the people involved. A teacher's sex scandal with one of her students turns everything upside down.

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: Bethany and Terrence are desperate to find another brother for their daughter.

programme.title: Remember Me, Mommy?
programme.desc: Rebecca, a teacher at Clark Academy, an elite girls boarding school, has a secret.

programme.title: Murder on Maple Drive
programme.desc: A couple purchases a home, and after they move in, strange things begin to happen.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: A group of retired secret agents reunite when they are targeted by mysterious assassins.

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses and his team of hapless heroes are tasked with finding a dangerous nuclear weapon

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: The world needed a hero, we got a hedgehog. Superpowered with speed, Sonic races to save the world and stop evil genius Dr. Robotnik from world domination. Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz and James Marsden star in the adventure the whole family will enjoy.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: Chinatown
programme.desc: Jake Gittes, a private eye, uncovers a web of personal and political scandals

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Jerry and Rachel are two strangers thrown together by a phone call from a woman they have never met.

programme.title: Red Eye
programme.desc: Moments after takeoff, Lisa's seatmate, Jackson, menacingly reveals the real reason he's on board

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A Naval officer, reprimanded after Pearl Harbor, is later promoted to Rear Admiral

programme.title: Ike: Countdown To D-Day
programme.desc: A study of the days leading up to the Normandy invasion through the eyes of Eisenhower and Winston Churchill.

programme.title: No Mercy
programme.desc: A big-city cop follows a gorgeous blond to New Orleans to avenge the murder of his partner. Edited for TV

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: A public defender pokes into places she shouldn't while trying to exonerate an innocent man accused of murder. Edited for TV

programme.title: The Lazarus Project
programme.desc: A harrowing and frightening thriller about a man who has everything he's ever loved stripped away from him and to earn his life and family back, he must face obstacles of mystical origins, endure countless tests of his faith, struggle with his own sanity, and explore the depth and the power of his soul.

programme.title: A Study In Terror
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson join the hunt for the notorious serial killer, Jack The Ripper.

programme.title: In A Lonely Place
programme.desc: Humphrey Bogart as a screenwriter falls in love with a neighbor who establishes an alibi when he is accused of murder.

programme.title: The Bedford Incident
programme.desc: The captain of a newly launched U.S. Destroyer is obsessed with hunting down a particular Soviet submarine regardless of the great risks involved.

programme.title: The Miracle Woman
programme.desc: A preacher's daughter becomes a pawn in a con man's elaborate ruse to pass her off as a faith healer.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: Trailers Reloaded
programme.desc: Check out these films that celebrate LGBTQ romance.

programme.title: Trailer Trivia
programme.desc: Check out the fun facts behind the best musicals in cinema.

programme.title: RT Essentials
programme.desc: Wondering what to slap on that new 4K TV to watch? We rundown the must stunning 4K movies ever.

programme.title: Holiday Inn
programme.desc: This musical follows a man who leaves showbiz to run an inn, and his former partner and rival in love.

programme.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
programme.desc: A Southern lawyer compassionately defends a black man accused of rape.

programme.title: The Ipcress File
programme.desc: Crook-turned-secret-agent Harry Palmer tries to find a missing scientist.

programme.title: Braking for Whales
programme.desc: A dysfunctional brother and sister are forced to come to terms with each other and themselves over their recently deceased mother's final wish. Starring Tom Felton, Tammin Sursok, Wendi Mclendon-Covey, David Koechner, and Austin Swift.

programme.title: Blush
programme.desc: The sexual, psychological and moral unraveling of an obsessive-compulsive, suburban mom. Starring Wendi McLendon-Covey, Christine Woods, Max Burkholder and Steve Little.

programme.title: Limerence
programme.desc: Rosemary, an aspiring painter and free spirit, moves to Venice, California where she falls for Tom, a charismatic gallery director. Their intense chemistry quickly evolves into a serious relationship that puts Rosemary to the test.

programme.title: Love Flower
programme.desc: Our guy Joshua is in a rut that is peaking with one of those bad days where things can't possibly get any worse in every single aspect of his life. Until his old pal Bucky shows up with even more bad news.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: A dancer and a boxer must team up for a big performance after a last minute drop out.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: Let Love Grow
programme.desc: Landscape architect Evie meets her match with new client Ryan, whose daughters are her biggest fan.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister's manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: Chandler Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: The Chandlers pack up and head to a cabin for maximum Family fun. With old feuds, new feuds, and a heap of Family stress, the Chandler family must pull together to make this the best Christmas ever.

programme.title: Snowbound For Christmas
programme.desc: Eager to impress her boss Adrian, Rachel lands a spot on a big project. They head to the presentation when a snowstorm traps her and Adrian at a resort. Spending quality time together they realize there is more to their relationship than just business.

programme.title: Girlfriends Getaway
programme.desc: An Innocent birthday getaway turns into absolute adventure when four long time friends looking for excitement in Trinidad find an escapade that leads them to Kidnapping, a robbery, and possible jail time.

programme.title: Girlfriends Getaway II
programme.desc: A bride and her three friends travel to Puerto Rico for her wedding when chaos ensues.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Kingmaker
programme.desc: Dreaming of changing the world, Seo Chang-dae takes part in Kim Woon-bum's presidential campaign.

programme.title: Hello Ghost
programme.desc: A loner's failed suicide attempt causes him to see four ghosts who keep following him everywhere. He tries to get rid of these spirits by fulfilling their regrets.

programme.title: The Girl on A Bulldozer
programme.desc: A single father gets into a mysterious car accident, leaving Hye-yeong and her young brother all alone.

programme.title: Cake
programme.desc: Young pastry chef, Ronnie, dreams of opening her own bakery, but friends, family, and her love life have plans of their own.

programme.title: Cheddy Ace
programme.desc: After taking out a "hood loan" to invest in a janky business a year earlier, Cheddy Ace is faced with repaying the loan to a pair of thugs within 24 hours. Desperate to pay his debt, Cheddy and his nephews try everything to help him raise it.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: After a recent breakup, Derrick, a hopeless romantic, moves into a new apartment looking for a fresh start in life. He quickly discovers that his beautiful next door neighbor, Jessie, may be in an abusive relationship. When she reaches out to him for help, they hatch a scheme to get away from danger.

programme.title: Keisha
programme.desc: Keisha always had a problem finding a decent job in her community. Financial hardship gets worse for her and her son after her grandmother dies and only leaves behind a Bible. Struggling to take care of her son and pay bills she turns to a job at a strip club. It's all to get a new life in a new city and away from the blackmailing child protective services agent. What sacrifices will she make for her and her son?

programme.title: Lacee
programme.desc: Four talented girls from different backgrounds form a R&B group with the intentions of being the best. They will soon find out that their dark journey consists of sex, power, and betrayal.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: Fast-talking diamond dealer Kyle Miller (Nicolas Cage) and his wife, Sarah (Nicole Kidman), live the good life in a beautiful home surrounded by thick woods. Their dream life turns into a nightmare when violent thieves, led by Elias (Ben Mendelsohn), invade their home disguised as police officers. With Kyle and Sarah now frightened captives, Kyle knows he must use every negotiating trick in his book, for once Elias and his men get what they want, the Millers will likely be killed.

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow of a Tear
programme.desc: After his wife is brutally murdered, a martial-arts master (Scott Adkins) teams up with an old friend (Kane Kosugi) to sharpen his battle skills and seek revenge.

programme.title: Faces in the Crowd
programme.desc: A serial killer closes in on a woman (Milla Jovovich) who no longer recognizes people's faces after barely surviving a deadly attack.

programme.title: Tidal Wave: No Escape
programme.desc: When brutal tidal waves suddenly destroy many coastal communities in a short period of time, John Wahl (Corbin Bernsen), a Nobel Prize winner, teams up with a Navy officer to find out the cause of the disaster.

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos as an alien invasion takes control of the planet in an effort to find one boy out of seven billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Control
programme.desc: A sociopath on death row (Ray Liotta, "Goodfellas") is given a chance to live if he agrees to take part in a chemical behavior modification program. Also starring Willem Dafoe, Michelle Rodriguez ("Lost") and Stephen Rea ("The Crying Game").

programme.title: Aerosmith
programme.desc: In a career of four turbulent decades of excesses and highs, Aerosmith became the biggest selling American rock band of all time. The ‘Bad Boys' came together in 1970 in Boston, Massachusetts. Aerosmith's third release, ‘Toys in the Attic' made them international stars. Lead single,'Sweet Emotion' became their first top 40 hit. In 1987 Aerosmith released their biggest selling album in over a decade, ‘Permanent Vacation'. The ‘Nine Lives' tour was troubled, but in 1998 Aerosmith's fortunes would change once again. Released as part of the soundtrack to the film, ‘Armageddon', ‘I Don't Want to Miss a Thing' would become the biggest single of their career. In 2012 Aerosmith released the single, ‘Legendary Child'. It had been eight years since they had produced new material but along with the track came the album, ‘Music from another Dimension'. Featuring archive material, music videos – “I DON'T WANNA MISS A THING” “JANIES GOT A GUN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6).

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: With a career of over two decades and album sales over 11 million, Foo Fighters are giants in the world of contemporary rock. The roots of the band were of a much smaller scale, though, with the early musical projects of a teenage Dave Grohl. Nirvana came to a tragic end with the death of front man, Kurt Cobain. Grohl began working with the songs he had written on tour, to produce the first Foo Fighters album. With 2 Grammys, multiple albums including a best of and a new album release in 2014 there is no stopping them. Featuring archive material, music videos – “BEST OF YOU” “MONKEY WRENCH” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.desc: Un joven comediante en apuros acepta un trabajo de baja categoría en un crucero donde espera su gran oportunidad de triunfar en la comedia de cruceros

programme.title: Asaltado
programme.desc: Lo que debería haber sido una escapada romántica se convierte en un divertido debacle tras otro cuando la mujer de Michael lo deja en el desierto.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: Santa sospecha que fue José Antonio el que ayudó a Octavio a llevarse a Lupita Miguel se sorprende al ver que Simona está perdiendo la cordura Maricruz les dice a todos que va a pelear por su hija y buscará a Octavio para arreglar la situación.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: El padre le dice a Maricruz que Simona ha perdido la razón y José Antonio por fin le regresa a su hija.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: Miguel aconseja a Octavio llevar a Simona a un sanatorio Maricruz se sorprende al ver llegar a Simona a su rancho, ella le sigue el juego a Simona y la invita a quedarse unos días.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: Maricruz le dice a Perico que podría tener un hijo sordomudo como su hermana José Antonio es llevado a su casa herido, Miguel y Esther se espantan al verlo así.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le propone a Adolfo matar a Manuel a cambio de su libertad. Matilde va a hablar con Remigio para que le explique el motivo del arresto de su administrador. Prudencia le dice que es una insensata por ponerse en evidencia.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le dice a Adolfo que lo va a acompañar por si le falla la puntería. Manuel recibe la carta de Adolfo citándolo y Silvano le dice que no vaya, que tal vez lo quiera matar. Pero Manuel le responde que no hay motivos para temer.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que siempre lo amará y que está feliz porque se solucionó el problema de Adolfo. Antonia le dice a Rosario que ya está vieja y que es tiempo de dejarle el lugar a una persona más joven.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Bella obliga a Angélica a sacar unos pagarés del lodo con los dientes, tal como se lo hizo ella alguna vez Angélica y Renato se enteran que Bella pagó la operación de su hijo.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María quiere divorciarse lo antes posible de Luis Fernando. Soraya continúa haciéndole la vida imposible a Alicia. María tiene un conflicto con Penélope al acusarla de robo. Luis Fernando se niega a darle el divorcio a María.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Gonzalo le pide a María que se case con él. Esperanza está completamente recuperada, y enfrenta a Soraya. Soraya le hace creer a Luis Fernando que pasaron la noche juntos.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche se encuentra muy agradecida con Jorge Luis, ya que, gracias a él, su hermano se ha recuperado del accidente. Jorge Luis se pelea con Santiago al escuchar las cosas que le dice a su padre.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche duda del amor que Santiago siente por ella. Andresito es dado de alta y por fin regresa a su hogar. Meche planea celebrarle a Rosario sus 15 años para invitar a Jorge Luis y verlo de nuevo.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Marimar planea humillar a Angélica a cambio de no enviar a Renato a la cárcel. Gema y Arturo le piden a Bella que sea madrina de su boda.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Bella obliga a Angélica a sacar unos pagarés del lodo con los dientes, tal como se lo hizo ella alguna vez Angélica y Renato se enteran que Bella pagó la operación de su hijo.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy repudia a Patricio por su arrogancia y, desolada, debe continuar con las representaciones teatrales. Omar conoce a Blanca y se sorprende de su parecido con Ivette. El padre Anselmo le asegura a Juan Miguel que el bebé de Marichuy es suyo.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy le cuenta a Juan Miguel sus razones para huir y esconder a su bebé, y además lo rechaza. Juan Miguel le confiesa a Blanca que ha encontrado a Marichuy, y ella decide liberarlo. Omar se encuentra con Ivette y cree que se está volviendo loco.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Nelson se desmaya y no reacciona. Omar sigue pensando que está alucinando con Ivette. Cecilia se encuentra con su nieto e inmediatamente le cuenta a Patricio. Marichuy trabaja y su bebé tiene fiebre, Juan Miguel se entera y corre a cuidar a su hijo.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Juan Miguel le confiesa a Omar que es el padre del bebé de Lirio y que su verdadero nombre es Marichuy. Cecilia va en busca de Marichuy pero ésta la rechaza y la repudia. Juan Miguel le confiesa a Marichuy que aún la ama.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Los padres de Vicente van a pedirle a Juan Miguel la mano de su hermana Rocío. Ivette va en busca de Omar, pero éste le dice que está enamorado de Marichuy y lo amenaza. Omar le dice a Marichuy que volverán a la hacienda aunque tenga que obligarla.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Leonor le dice a Ivana que puede perder la confianza de José Miguel si Sabino le dice la verdad. Ivana enfrenta a Valentina para decirle que está derrotada ante José Miguel. José Miguel va en búsqueda de Arcelia.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana descubre que el comandante Toledo la está buscando. José Miguel piensa que Valentina le mintió y lo usó para vengarse de los hombres. El padre Justino le dice a José Miguel que se cuide de Ivana porque no está bien mentalmente.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Alfonsina hace averiguaciones sobre la muerte de su padre. Gertrudis es incapaz de traicionar a su hermana y su tío también se llama a silencio.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Álvaro pide una orden para que Justo quite los animales de su propiedad. Además, algo le preocupa en relación a Alfonsina y El manantial.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Justo busca recuperar El manantial para que el asesinato de Rigoberto continúe oculto. Por ello, se remonta al inicio de todo.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Héctor permanece junto a su hermana. Justo asiste al velorio y habla con Alfonsina. ¿Qué le propondrá?

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Se confirma que Alejandro no es el padre de Bárbara. Héctor tiene en su poder una prueba importante. Justo engaña a Pilar.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Alfonsina permanece junto a Héctor. Justo tiene sed de venganza. Los restos de Rigoberto, Francisca y Gertrudis llegan en El manantial.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Plan de escape
programme.desc: La policía descubre que el verdadero asesino de Efraín es Cynthia. Cynthia idea un plan para poder huir del pueblo y evitar que sea arrestada. Bruno le hace creer a Cynthia que tendrá su apoyo incondicional para evitar que la policía la arreste.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Alz y Heimmer hablan sobre sus amigos del pasado, pero uno de ellos olvida todo. El agente "D Zente" abre un nuevo caso titulado "El asesinato del millonario de la calle Hill".

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer enfurece al ver que uno de los camarógrafos no hace el conteo debido para empezar la grabación. Sammy y Miguel Luis muestran su nueva "Sección Imposible" con el tema del Día de Reyes.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico descubre que no tiene nada de dinero, el banco los va a embargar y Federica habla con ellos y les dice que Ludovico se murió para que cancelen su deuda, pero asistirán al velorio porque es una muerte muy sospechosa.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico no sabe qué regalarle a Federica para su aniversario, se emborracha con Flavio y van a tatuarse los nombres de sus esposas, pero los tatuadores se equivocan y ponen los nombres al revés.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica vende zapatos de piel por catálogo y Ludovico se pone muy celoso porque está ganando mucho dinero y decide competir con ella vendiendo ropa interior para mujer, pero es detenido por vender sin permiso.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica están aprendiendo a usar el chat para conocer gente usando nombres falsos. En el chat, sin darse cuenta. se encuentran entre ellos.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico creen que Ludoviquito tendrá su primera relación sexual. A lo que al final era el cumpleaños de la sobrina de don Camerino.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Los empleados del hotel confunden a la mamá del dueño con otra mujer. Don Chava se enamora de la mamá del patrón y trata de conquistarla, pero ella lo desprecia.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Vítor le organiza una fiesta de quince años a su mamá porque nunca pudo celebrarlos y le pide a todos sus compañeros que lo apoyen siendo padrinos de su madre.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Don Cipriano le cuenta a los empleados que Ninel Conde celebrará su baby shower en el hotel, pero el licenciado Mariano Brajales le informa que hay una denuncia en contra del hotel porque no tiene las medidas de seguridad necesarias.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano elige a Vitor como el empleado del mes y recibe de premio una noche en la suite presidencial del hotel. Vitor es atacado por Chabelita, don Chava lo salva y le dice que todos los huéspedes son zombies.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le llama a Cipriano y le dice que uno de sus amigos hará su fiesta en el hotel y él piensa que es Serapio, cuando descubre que se equivocó, se arrepiente de haber pagado todo.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos: Nuevos amigos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano están a punto de ser expulsados del condominio, pero se hacen amigos de sus vecinos en una fiesta y les permiten quedarse.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel se siente terrible por haber dormido con Sabrina, después ella se presenta en la escuela. Llegan a hacer una auditoría a Gandía. Diego presenta a Lola como su novia. Mía le confiesa a Miguel que está lista para su primera vez con él.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta va a casa de Reverte para descubrirlo. Miguel confiesa no haberse cuidado con Sabrina. Eligen a Mía y Roberta como capitanas del equipo de porristas. Mía le pide a Roberta consejos de sexualidad.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta acompaña a Mía al ginecólogo porque necesita orientación sexual para planear su primera vez con Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Raymundo y Viridiana le dicen a Lupita que Lola es adoptada. Franco le confiesa a Mía y Miguel que no sabe cómo hablar de sexo con ellos. Alma y Franco se besan y Reverte se molesta al verlos. Los chicos del otro Insti llegan y empieza la rivalidad.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Celina se anima al saber que Max la espera. Max le hace creer a Sol que Teo le dio un regalo. Sol queda en ridículo cuando Teo la rechaza enfrente de Mía. Sol le enseña a Miguel una foto de Mía con Enzo. Alma y Reverte discuten y Roberta los ve.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol le inventa a Gandía que Mia se acuesta con los chicos del equipo contrario. Los alumnos del Elite se pelean con los alumnos del Latinoamericano. Mia le agradece a Celina por salvarla de las intrigas de Sol.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta e Iñaki siguen a Reverte y secuestran a su perro. Bustamante le dice a Diego que se quiere casar. Tato sale con Vico y la deja abandonada en medio de una redada. Sol conoce a Sabrina y se empiezan a aliar en contra de Mía.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Juan decide irse antes de matar a Rodrigo y hacerle daño a la mujer que ama. Raúl intenta suicidarse creyendo que Juan le hará daño. Gabriel encuentra a María y la lleva a casa de Juan para ayudarla. María confunde a Juan con su padre.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Juan queda sorprendido al enterarse de que Renato está construyendo viviendas para los trabajadores. Juan le avisa a Noel que se irá a Europa. Arcadio vuelve a encerrar a María en los pasadizos.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Regina le impide a Jimena regresar al campamento para evitar que se encuentre con Servando. Aimeé se disfraza de monja para poder salir de la finca, sin percatarse de que Renato la sigue. Juan es herido durante el asalto al navío de Rodrigo.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Juan se recupera de su herida lejos de casa y le pide a sus compañeros que regresen el dinero de Rodrigo a sus dueños reales. Aimeé le hace creer a Regina que ella fue la que salió por la noche a la playa.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Aimeé se disfraza de Regina para poder escapar de la hacienda y ver a Juan. Regina sufre al saber que Renato está completamente enamorado de Aimeé. Juan decide terminar su relación con Aimeé.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: El Padre Mundo decide no aceptar a Regina en el convento. Noel cierra el trato con Rodrigo de hacer de la finca una propiedad de Renato. Clemencia descubre el lugar donde se esconde Juan.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia decide presentarse en la fiesta de Pablo y Gina causando conmoción entre los invitados. Pablo y Juan de Dios se ponen celosos al ver a Julia bailando con Guillermo. Pablo y Julia se besan.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia se enoja con Pablo por besarla. Fausto golpea a Julia frente a todos en la fiesta de Pablo y Gina. Pablo se despide de Julia, ella acepta que tiene sentimientos por él. Guillermo coquetea con Dinorah y ella se siente atraída.

programme.title: La noche del halcón
programme.desc: Un rudo pistolero retirado tiene problemas con su hijo adoptivo, cuando este se enamora de la misma mujer que él ama.

programme.title: Guerra entre bandas
programme.desc: La mafia ha decidido eliminar a un hombre porque considera que sabe demasiado, pero ignora de lo que es capaz.

programme.title: Por un puñado de tierra
programme.desc: La hija de un hombre asesinado y despojado de sus tierras, les prepara una gran sorpresa a la familia rival.

programme.title: El Tigre de Santa Julia
programme.desc: Miguel Negrete es un desertor del Ejército mexicano devenido en el famoso bandido apodado "el Tigre de Santa Julia", que roba en beneficio de los pobres, pero es traicionado y entregado a las autoridades.

programme.title: Desnúdate, Lucrecia
programme.desc: Una joven que asiste a la despedida de soltera de una amiga se enamora del novio, y juntos viven una serie de aventuras.

programme.title: La noche es nuestra
programme.desc: Un dramaturgo resulta herido defendiendo a una prostituta de un maleante. Después, ella finge ser una mujer casada y lo visita.

programme.title: Dios No lo Quiera
programme.desc: Una mujer borracha cae en las redes de un hombre jugador y vividor, del que trata de escapar pero espera un hijo de él.

programme.title: Por ellas aunque mal paguen
programme.desc: Un hombre se hace pasar por noble para que su hija pueda casarse con un hacendado de Jalisco.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La novedad es flor de un día, hoy ya no luce lo que ayer lucía
programme.desc: Los celos de José Luis lo están alejando de Marieta y si no hace algo por cambiar, podría perderla para siempre.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Al hombre osado la fortuna le da la mano
programme.desc: Amalia, Sebastián y Hernán son tres adolescentes que viven en hogares violentos y han aprendido que la violencia es algo cotidiano.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Si quieres conocer a Inés, vive con ella un mes
programme.desc: Una joven menosprecia a su madre y se obsesiona con el estilo de vida de su vecina al grado de que un día entra a su casa sin permiso. La joven descubre que la vida de su vecina no es tan grandiosa como ella pensaba.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Por la muestra se conoce el paño
programme.desc: Camila y Alexa son primas y su abuela tiene preferencia por una de ellas. Esto es culpa de sus madres, pues la madre de Camila le ha enseñado a ser presumida y grosera con su prima.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El hábito no hace al monje, pero lo distingue
programme.desc: Una joven tiene que vivir con su padre y su madrastra tras la muerte de su madre, su actitud frente a la vida es de sufrimiento y opta por no estudiar, ni trabajar, pero al conocer un joven que perdió las ganas de vivir, logrará ver la realidad.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: ¡Despierta América!

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: In this episode, Colin Comer appraises a freshly built barn find 1970 Ford F100 pickup truck, an original-owner 1988 Lamborghini LM002 aka the “Rambo Lambo," and a 1971 Ford Bronco that has been used in some interesting off-road situations.

programme.title: 2020 Ford GT, 1976 Pontiac Trans-Am, and an Aston Martin DB4 | The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin tries to put a value on a 2020 Ford GT that has one of the most desirable paint combinations and trim packages you could get in 2020. After that, Colin focuses his attention on a 1967 Pontiac Trans-Am with the "Screamin' Chicken" on the hood, and a 1962 Aston Martin DB4

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: In this episode of "The Appraiser," Colin Comer has the pleasure of appraising Larry Chen's R32 Nissan Skyline GT-R. After that, HOONIGAN's Vin Anatra shows up with his modified 2009 BMW M3.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin Comer takes a look at a modified Jaguar Mark II and determines if the modifications were worth the investment.Next, Colin gives us the inside scoop on a car 2-cylinder Fiat Abart. To finish up this episode, a legendary classic off-roader rolls into the garage: an FJ40 Toyota Land Cruiser

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Chris Jacobs stops by to surprise Colin with his "Daily" 1985 Porsche 911 Targa and throws Colin for a loop.After that, Colin takes a look at a Porsche 930 Turbo tuned to "outrun the cops," and a ZL1 clone Chevrolet Camaro.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin Comer takes a look at a 1993 Ford Mustang SVT Cobra with only 500 miles on it followed by one of the original “Rent-A-Racers”: a 1966 Shelby GT 350 Hertz.To finish things up, Colin brings in a another 1966 Mustang, but this one has over 350,000 miles on the odometer!

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin Comer starts this episode out with an original 1969 double COPO Camaro before moving onto a well-driven and well-loved 1969 Ford Mustang Mach 1.Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Camaro Z/28 that has a 302ci "DZ-code" V8 and a stack of documents to keep someone busy for days. This car has a glowing wrap sheet but it's going to take more than the right specs and shiny paint to hit a six-figure price tag. Will Colin agree with the owner's price?

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin has the pleasure of looking over a rust-free 1966 Dodge Charger from the Arizona desert with all the right factory options.Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Dodge Coronet Super Bee that is an all-original California-built car. Packaged with a 383ci V8 and a factory N96 air grabber hood, Colin thinks this to be an attractive car based on its unique color combo of high-impact F6 metallic green and black interior. But, original cars do come with flaws and Colin found a few in the rear end of the car.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: 90,000sqft or six barns full of dusty, rusty, forgotten treasures from decades of collecting. To name a few, GTOs, Caprices, Firebirds, Blazers, Suburban, Trucks, Jeeps, Broncos, and some pre-war cars. Everything is for sale and everything must go. Message email above, serious inquiries only.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets an exclusive and in-depth tour of the Detroit Historical Society's backroom collection, showcasing priceless Detroit icons. These rare cars are meticulously preserved in climate-controlled bubbles known as car capsules to suspend and slow the aging process so future generations have the opportunity to enjoy them.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: The Flathead V-8 in this barn find Ford F1 pickup is FILLED with oil sludge. Can Davin and Jeff get it cleaned out enough to get this beauty of a farm truck running again? BONUS FEATURE AT THE END! Watch an incredible time-lapse rebuild of a flathead Ford V8 engine!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: BIG NEWS: This is the first video in a five-part series featuring a DeTomaso Pantera, a collaboration between "Redline Rebuild" and "Barn Find Hunter". On "Barn Find Hunter," we always uncover cars that have been hidden for years and delve into their fascinating stories. Typically, we are involved in the initial phase of the barn find story, step one. Rarely do we have the privilege of witnessing steps two and three: the exchange of ownership and the restoration. Today is that special day! Tom's son, Brian, has purchased a DeTomaso Pantera that has been frozen in time for nearly 40 years. The Pantera gets loaded onto a flatbed and taken back to the shop for a thorough assessment of its condition, with plans to get the engine running and potentially turn it into our next Redline Rebuild project. Stay tuned for more videos from the Redline Rebuild Team!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom travels to Michigan to visit Mick, a previous guest on our 'Will it Run' series with Davin Reckow. Mick has a massive collection of Chrysler 'Hemi' cars, rare one-off models, and some celebrity-owned vehicles, specifically, 'The Fonz's' motorcycle.

programme.title: Jamie's Food Escapes
programme.desc: This is peasant country where, although the people are not wealthy, they eat like kings.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. She tastes onion pie, delicious cured pork, and one of the oldest cheeses in the world, kopanisti, still made on the island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, yachting and water sports, just 20 minutes south of the Greek capital, Athens. Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a famous local marble sculptor en route to visit an old friend and great cook, where she learns the secrets of pinched sweet cheese cakes, ancient sesame-honey confections and more. Back in her own kitchen, she creates a luscious Tinos-style artichoke bread pudding and red mullet in caper sauce, both Tinos traditional specialties.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores everything from beguiling mastiha, to the local pasta to unique tomatoes, dangling like giant rubies against the renowned geometric patterns on medieval houses of Pyrgi. The flavors of historic Chios inspire her to cook up a succulent chicken and quince dish and an easy traditional black eyed pea salad with Mastiha vinaigrette.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.sub-title: Naxos: Meat & Potatoes Like You Never Had'em
programme.desc: Naxos is famed for the quality of its meats, its array of cow's milk and sheep-and-goats' milk cheeses and for its potatoes. Diane heads from the shore straight to a remote mountain hideaway with Alexis in tow, where two local cooks await them with a feast of stuffed lamb, potatoes, and a unique skillet pumpkin-onion pie.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Near the historic Bay of Navarino, blanketed by olive, citrus trees and home to historical culinary artifacts unearthed in prehistoric clay tablets at Pylos, Diane cooks with two village ladies, making a local pork and fig dish, and olive-oil fried bread. Inspired by the cornucopia of olive oil, oranges and other local delicacies, she cooks up a Messinian meal.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.sub-title: Evia - An Island Hiding In Plain Sight
programme.desc: The second-largest Greek island and an hour from Athens, Diane heads out in search of mushrooms with a local mushroom forager and cultivator. They cook a favorite local recipe "kritharoto," mushrooms with orzo. Diane makes three delectable dishes with mushrooms, wine and local ingrediants, inspired by the flavors of this nearby "secret" land.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the rich, cuisine of Corfu, a mixture of Greek, Italian, French and others. A local cook makes a Venetian soffrito, and orange salad. In the market: Corfu's famous kumquats, ouzo-infused figs, local fish. Diane cooks up mixed braised greens with feta, an Italian fish stew called bourtheto and Venetian pastitsio, reworked for the modern cook.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: To embrace the cosmopolitan aura of this island, Diane visits Alkis Downward, who created a sustainable agriculture project on one of Greece's most touristed Aegean islands. Discover the food of Paros and its local recipes: rabbit, skate salad and air-dried mackerel. Diane prepares a Greek island meal that will make you want to sail straight to the Aegean.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In Chios, a local ritual: the making of Chian firewater, Souma, distilled from fermented figs. In this foray through Chios's traditions, Diane discovers delicious desserts, all part of the table for this feast. Chios is for food lovers, and Diane returns to her kitchen for some great island-inspired dishes. Eggplant pilaf and an aromatic meat-filled omelet are on the menu.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits Lefkada, where she discovers Greece's tastiest, tenderest lentils, rosewater vinegar, and the art of local embroidery. A local cook imparts the secrets of the local lemony cod stew. Diane succumbs to the siren's call of flavors and history known as the Ionian Islands and prepares a bevy of dishes from several of these lush, delicious lands off Greece's western coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane introduces us to some of the islands' customs, landscapes and culinary delights: wine-soaked cheeses, grape leaves stuffed with everything, pasta with caramelized onions and a tart fermented cheese, sparkling wines, cumin-scented rusks and tiny, crunchy shrimp. These delectable recipes will have us all wanting to cook with the flavors of Dodecanese for dinner.

programme.title: Descending

programme.title: Descending

programme.title: Descending
programme.desc: For centuries, the St. Lawrence Seaway and the Great Lakes have shaped the story of Canada. The team takes a trip through history and visits the world's best collection of freshwater shipwrecks to discover what makes this water so great.

programme.title: Descending

Ellis befriends a local Papuan who teaches him to fish like a local and the divers have a close encounter with Giant Manta Rays. A terrifying accident shakes the confidence of the team.

programme.title: Descending
programme.desc: Following his accident, Scott finds the strength to dive again. In Indonesia's Lembeh Strait, the mission is to film as many strange creatures as they can find. programme.title: The Showstopper
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's (Froylan Tercero) lack of knowledge of the vehicle's specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze... and when his error causes it to explode, he and Matt (Matt Burch) abandon builders/owners Mickie (Michael Q. Schmidt) and Joey (Gino Calabro) in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Nursery Crime
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos. Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor.

programme.title: Call for Help
programme.desc: With the pressure of Froy's legal problems mounting, the team does everything they can to convince him to hire a lawyer. Froy and Matt confront a misogynist frat boy with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy wrangle with a squadron of costumed rally racers, and Lou, Matt, and Froy get the surprise of a lifetime when they're faced with a truck-full of vicious gangsters.

programme.title: The Big Letdown
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas, he considers taking matters into his own hands. Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle. Then, when one woman behaves like a child, Matt puts her in timeout, but worries he may have gone too far. And finally, Lou, Matt, and Froy take on an jealous husband with deadly aim.

programme.title: Knife Week
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle. Back in LA, Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker, and Lou is left to protect the girls from two knife wielding debtors who will go to any lengths to keep their vehicles.

programme.title: Think, Adapt and Attack
programme.desc: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats, chaos erupts, and Lou, Lyndah and Sonia fight not only with them, but also with each other. Down in Texas, Matt and Froy wait to clear up Froy's warrant and get in way over their heads working for a local repo team. Meanwhile, Lou decides to re-hire Frankie despite Sonia and Lyndah's objections, but first Lou wants to see how Frankie fares when faced with the temptation in the form of strippers and alcohol.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's the colorful hour, all-show long Drew celebrates the bold, bright and beautiful colors all around us. In Drew's News, Drew and Ross Mathews chat with Kitten Kay Sera, who recently married the color pink after dating it for 40 years. Then, in Designed by Drew, Drew surprises a deserving mom of three by transforming her beige bedroom into a space full of color and shares her top tips for those who want to go bold. Plus, beauty expert Mi- Anne Chan shares how to shake up your beauty routine at any age with pops of purple.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

Plus, “This Is Life with Lisa Ling” host Lisa Ling is joining Drew at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's News with Kyle Mooney, John Early, OnePiece, ThreeLooks

Plus, Drew's Crew makeup and style guru Zanna Roberts Rassi is sharing with viewers one piece that you can turn into three different looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Jeff Goldblum, Madelaine Petsch, Hometown Spirit:Dallas
programme.desc: Actor Jeff Goldblum on his Disney+ series “The World According to Jeff Goldblum.” Plus, “Riverdale” actress Madelaine Petsch stops by to chat. Plus, Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Dallas.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Sabrina Carpenter, Drew's News, Sunday Ragu Pasta with Carla Lalli Music
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Then, singer Sabrina Carpenter on her new album. Plus, Chef Carla Lalli Music wraps up Pasta Week with a Sunday Ragu Pasta dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's News with Dionne Warwick, Sutton Foster, Vanessa Lachey
programme.desc: Dionne Warwick joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk and chats about her new single “Nothing's Impossible” featuring Chance The Rapper. Then, actress Sutton Foster chats with Drew about her new memoir “Hooked.” Plus, cookie week continues with “Life From Scratch” author Vanessa Lachey sharing her favorite peanut butter blossoms cookie recipe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "A League of Their Own" star Abbi Jacobson opens up about her recent engagement, her bestie Ilana Glazer, what it was like co-creating, writing, producing and starring in "A League of Their Own" and more! Plus, Drew has a big surprise in store for Abbi! Abbi also joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk covering everything from the great bedding debate, the adult soccer fest taking Tennessee by storm and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Daniel Radcliffe, Drew's News with Lake Bell
programme.desc: "Weird: The Al Yankovic Story" star Daniel Radcliffe stops by to chat. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News with actress and author of the new audiobook, "Inside Voice" Lake Bell.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.desc: Drew kicks off Beauty Week revealing 100 beauty tips and giving head-to-toe makeovers to deserving viewers all week long! Actress Michelle Pfeiffer joins Drew to share her favorite tips and discuss her award-winning fragrance Henry Rose. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are joined at the Drew's News desk by Megababe Founder and body acceptance champion Katie Sturino.

programme.desc: Meet Lena and Olya Esipovas, a formidable mother-daughter team based in Uzbekistan devoting their lives to saving the saiga – a critically endangered antelope with a distinctive bulbous nose. In 2015 an epidemic tragically wiped out half of the remaining population, killing over 200,000 animals in just a few days, making the work of Lena and Olya and their team of volunteers all the more urgent.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: The Kakapo, or owl parrot, is a large flightless bird found on two New Zealand islands: Codfish Island and Anchor Island. In the 1990s their numbers dropped to as low as 50 birds but this figure is now on the rise. Deidre Vercoe is responsible for running a conservation scheme which monitors each one of the remaining birds to keep them safe and to encourage them to breed.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.sub-title: Anna and the Thresher Sharks (The Philippines)
programme.desc: On the island of Malapascua in the Philippines, Anna Oposa and her team are working with local fisherman to create a nature reserve where thresher sharks can thrive. These sharks are famous for their long tails which they use to whip and stun their prey. Every day, pelagic thresher sharks head to Monad Shoal, a sunken island just off the coast of Malapascua, where other fish “clean” them of their external parasites. This remarkable sight is popular with divers but the numbers of thresher sharks are dwindling and Anna is spearheading the campaign to protect this incredible species in the Philippines.

programme.title: Procrastination Station
programme.desc: Fascinating ideas for when you should probably be doing something else. 1) What happens to people's donated eggs and sperm after they die? | Ellen Trachman 2) Could an orca give a TED Talk? | Karen Bakker 3) How statistics can be misleading - Mark Liddell 4) What a nun can teach a scientist about ecology | Victoria Gill 5) Who is the fastest creature in mythology? | Iseult Gillespie 6) Is it really that bad to marry my cousin? | Mona Chalabi

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Avalanche
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Blizzard
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fin del Mundo
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile the area the South Americans call the Fin del Mundo the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat Northanger to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror

programme.sub-title: Burning Building, Scorpion Pit, Rotating Climbing Wall
programme.desc: Contestants descend into a pit filled with more than 2,000 scorpions. Host: Joe Rogan.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Junk Yard Dog, Confidence Chamber, Car Carrier Drive-thru
programme.desc: Stunt one is for the dogs as contestants make their way through an urban assault training building and press buttons to raise 6 flags. Along the way, they would have to get past 4 trained attack dogs. Stunt two is a gas as they have to stay inside a room full of CS gas (tear gas). The three contestants to stay in the room the longest would advance to the final. For the final, they start driving a car next to a moving car carrier going 40 mph. When a horn sounded, they would have to drive their car up a ramp and into the back of the car carrier. The contestant to do this the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion and win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Slalom, Piercing, Maggoty Cheese, Flag Snag II
programme.desc: This was an extended 4-stunt episode. For the first stunt, contestants have to hang by their ankles from trapeze hanging from a helicopter that flew over 20 flagpoles. The have to release as many flags as possible. In the second stunt, they are strapped down and their left arm would be pierced by 10 needles which would get progressively thicker. In the third, it's eating 4 ounces stinky cheese crawling with maggots. For the final stunt, contestants shimmy out to the end of horizontal pole 10 stories high, grab a flag, and clip it on to a rope hanging overhead. The fastest would win $50,000
